song_details.name: Bhavamulona
song_details.arohanam: S G2 M1 P N2 S ||
song_details.avarohanam: S N2 P M G2 S ||

content.swara: gOvinda gOvinda yani koluvavO manasa ||
gOvinda gOvinda yani koluvavO manasa ||
hari hari anavO manasA||
hari hari anavO manasA||
vishNuvu vishnNuvani vedaka vO manasA ||

content.sahitya: In Thought (“Bhavamu-lona”) And Action (“Bahyamunandunu”) Chant (“Koluva”) "Govinda," Oh My ||
